name: Sugarplums
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Dried figs; 1/6 cup per ounce
2 oz Almonds, slivered; 1/6 cup per ounce, toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. Pulse figs, almonds, cocoa, and cinnamon in a food processor just until almonds and figs are the size of peppercorns.
2. Add honey, orange zest, and Amaretto and pulse 3-4 times, just until mixed in.
3. Form mixture into 1-inch balls and roll in sugar.
4. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place for up to 1 week.
Per piece: 77 calories, 2 gm fat.
